scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src='.next'; const dst='dist'; console.log('CWD:', process.cwd()); console.log('Src exists:', fs.existsSync(src)); if(fs.existsSync(dst)) fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true}); if(fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Copy successful'); } else { console.log('Source not found!'); } console.log('Dst exists after:', fs.existsSync(dst));"
